calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Vacated

JUDICIAL MEDIATION
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Continued To Jul-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mindy Morton for (plaintiff) Automattic Inc., Paul Sieminski (general counsel) also present. Christopher Aguilar for (defendant) The Wrap News, Inc., Sharon Waxman (CEO) also present.

The parties participated in Judicial Mediation which resulted in settlement. The Court stated that the parties have reached an agreement, the terms to be memorialized as follows:

The Wrap News, Inc. will pay $10.000.00 and provide a tweet with the terms as set forth: "Good news: settled dispute w@automattic@wordpressvip@photomatt, happy to work together in the future, sorry to impune biz ethics."

Ms. Waxman and Mr. Sieminski both stated their agreement to terms of the settlement. Ms. Morton will prepare a memo of understanding for the parties to review and sign. The tweet will go out once the defendants receive the signed deal.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Set For Trial On Jul-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
